notes: Pinned provider boundary: terraform-provider-oci at the sources.lock revision does not register a Managed Services for Mac MacDevice resource or datasource, so this row keeps repo-curated OCI-style placeholder names while recording the reviewed SDK surface for generator-owned registry links.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: GetMacDevice, ListMacDevices, and TerminateMacDevice form the published controller-backed surface in github.com/oracle/oci-go-sdk/v65/mngdmac. The SDK does not expose CreateMacDevice, UpdateMacDevice, or DeleteMacDevice, and TerminateMacDeviceResponse returns only opc-request-id plus opc-work-request-id headers.

Pinned OCI SDK identity and lifecycle shape: GetMacDevice and TerminateMacDevice both require macOrderId plus macDeviceId, ListMacDevices requires macOrderId and can narrow by id, and the lifecycle enum is CREATING, ACTIVE, NEEDS_ATTENTION, DELETING, and DELETED.

Repo-authored runtime contract is narrower than the visible SDK surface: the published kind is bind-existing plus terminate-only, requires explicit macOrderId plus macDeviceId, projects state from GetMacDevice, uses ListMacDevices only for exact-id absence confirmation, and treats every spec field as identity-only once bound.

Delete follows the TerminateMacDevice work request through service-local GetWorkRequest on MacOrderClient, then rereads GetMacDevice or ListMacDevices until OCI reports DELETED or NotFound before releasing the finalizer.
